description: Square card built over a desaturated black-and-white close-up photograph of a young man's face, with a vehicle seat headrest visible behind him. He has short hair, a small beard, an earring, and a teardrop-shaped tattoo under one eye. The left side carries a dark translucent panel holding cyan serif headline text 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with a white subhead '1/27/2025 | Chicago, IL'. Below in large white sans-serif: 'Honduran National'. A bulleted 'CRIMES:' list follows: 'Robbery & escape', 'Retail theft', 'Confirmed Sureno gang member'. The DHS/ICE seal and 'ICE' wordmark sit in the lower-left corner. A bold red diagonal banner across the lower-right corner reads 'CHICAGO'. The image is high-contrast monochrome.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/27/2025 | Chicago, IL; Honduran National; CRIMES: Robbery & escape, Retail theft, Confirmed Sureno gang member; CHICAGO
